notes: Build 32: big render-speed fix. The preview path line was being redrawn every single frame even when static, and the moving dots/glows kept re-blitting off-tab. Now the path line only redraws when the pattern/speed/range changes, dots only move when they actually move, and ALL preview drawing is skipped when you're not on OPERATE (lights keep running). Should make OPERATE + COLOR much snappier.
